/usr/bin/c++  -pthread "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/core/FFmpegJob.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/core/JobValidator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/core/ExtraArgsParser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/core/ContainerRules.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/command/CommandBuilder.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/process/FFmpegProcess.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/process/WxProcessRunner.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/process/ProgressParser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/gui/App.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ffmpeg-gui.dir/src/gui/MainFrame.cpp.o" -o ffmpeg-gui  -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -pthread -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2
